name: Floral Bolster Jacquard Throw Pillow Pink/Cream - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Elevate the look of your indoor space with this Bolster Jacquard Throw Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This bolster throw pillow is covered with floral patterning on a textured backdrop with flange corners for an elegant look. Made with a 100% cotton slub exterior and polyester filling, this bolster pillow feels soft and comfortable, and it's finished with a neat sewn-seam closure.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
